cadence_note: Unpaused 2026-07-15: the pause cited diagnoserioppenvard, which is no longer part of this connector (not in the accepted set; the 5 download specs are dodsorsaker, graviditeterforlossningarochnyfodda, lakemedel, yttreorsakertillskadorochforgiftningar and -barn). Run 20260715-005937 finalized clean in 810s across all 10 specs, well inside a GHA leg. Socialstyrelsen publishes no schedule for the developer-page ZIP exports, so this cadence is inferred, not cited: the subjects are annual (arsuppgifter) and the ZIPs are full snapshots with no incremental query support, so every run re-fetches the whole ~600M-row corpus. 30 days catches the annual release and later revisions (dodsorsaker ZIP Last-Modified 2025-11-26) without re-pulling everything weekly.
